steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice C (180)
steps.content:
Substitute $x=50$, $y=180$ into the equation $$0.10x + 0.20y = 0.19(x+y)$$.

Compute left side: $$0.10(50) + 0.20(180) = 5 + 36 = 41$$.

Compute right side: $$0.19(50+180) = 0.19(230) = 43.7$$.

Since $41 \neq 43.7$, choice C does not satisfy the equation.

steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice D (450)
steps.content:
Substitute $x=50$, $y=450$ into the equation $$0.10x + 0.20y = 0.19(x+y)$$.

Compute left side: $$0.10(50) + 0.20(450) = 5 + 90 = 95$$.

Compute right side: $$0.19(50+450) = 0.19(500) = 95$$.

Since both sides are equal, choice D satisfies the equation.

The answer is 450.
